blockers.title: Canonical capability gaps remain
blockers.detail: Some critical ERP/MES/eQMS capabilities are still missing or not explicit in the model.
blockers.nextAction: Complete the missing capability areas and define lineage for them before large-scale onboarding.

blockers.title: Secondary capability overlays need expansion
blockers.detail: The schema is strong, but some secondary capability overlays remain thin.
blockers.nextAction: Deepen maintenance/calibration/security overlays and publish corresponding workflow/policy metadata.

quadrants.label: Accelerate
quadrants.hint: Low blockers, ready for rapid onboarding

quadrants.label: Stabilize

quadrants.label: Govern
quadrants.hint: Add ownership, workflow, and policy signals

quadrants.label: Rework
quadrants.hint: Architecture or metadata posture needs redesign

releaseRadar.narrative: World-class posture is strongest in canonical breadth and journey completeness; the dominant release drag now comes from ownership/workflow governance rather than physical schema coverage.

personas.label: System architect
personas.focus: Compare branches, protect compatibility, steer release radar and hotspot remediation.
nextActions: Review hotspot hubs and typed-diff breaking changes on the compare canvas.
Save architecture views by domain/layer and prepare release notes with approval evidence.

personas.label: Data engineer
personas.focus: Shape indexes, relations, defaults, migration risk, and registry compiler hygiene.
nextActions: Validate destructive change firewall items and lock-sensitive alters before publish.
Compile registry bundles after relation/index changes and review drift in projection outputs.

personas.label: Manufacturing process engineer
personas.focus: Follow demand → BOM/routing → dispatch → execution → genealogy with line-ready views.
nextActions: Create focused views for line orchestration, execution evidence, and lot/serial genealogy.
Bind runtime workflow contracts for dispatch, completion, downtime, and quality containment loops.

personas.label: Quality manager
personas.focus: Control inspection, nonconformance, CAPA, training, evidence and signatures.
nextActions: Link approval and e-signature evidence to high-risk tables before broad release.
Use storyboard reviews for incoming quality, deviation closure, and controlled document readiness.

personas.label: Compliance lead
personas.focus: Enforce stewardship, approval routing, evidence packs, policy posture, and CAB escalations.
nextActions: Close owner/steward/approver gaps and attach review evidence before promotion.
Escalate destructive changes or locked-down policy changes through CAB/e-sign lanes.

personas.label: App builder / metadata admin
personas.focus: Translate canonical schema into registry fields, forms, APIs, workflows, and module packs.
nextActions: Compile registry bundles after semantic changes and validate form/API/workflow projections.
Save persona views for builder onboarding and digital-thread walkthroughs.

playbooks.title: Executive release gate
checklist: Review release radar, blocker board, and hotspot concentration.
Verify compatibility score, destructive change firewall status, and rollback narrative.
Confirm saved executive storyboard for CAB / architecture walkthrough.
Generate release notes and approval evidence bundle.
playbooks.hero: Best for weekly architecture, CAB, and release steering reviews.

playbooks.title: Migration firewall review
checklist: Inspect typed diff items by severity, approval class, and rollback complexity.
Check relation endpoints, lock-sensitive alters, and index coverage changes.
Validate registry compiler output after compare and capture migration notes.
Escalate destructive or narrowing changes through elevated/CAB lanes.
playbooks.hero: Best for schema compare, migration sequencing, and drift-safe releases.

playbooks.title: Manufacturing storyboard walkthrough
checklist: Trace planning, dispatch, execution, completion, and genealogy on one focused view.
Validate work-order workflow bindings and event/evidence capture points.
Confirm routing, operation, and resource tables remain linked to execution and quality.
Save line-centric views for planners, supervisors, and operations analysts.
playbooks.hero: Best for line execution, genealogy, and production readiness reviews.

playbooks.title: Quality / compliance gate
checklist: Review approval/e-signature posture for controlled quality and deviation tables.
Check owner, steward, approver, evidence, and reason-code completeness.
Validate inspection, NC/CAPA, training, and document chains for auditability.
Promote only after governance and evidence signals are visible in diagnostics.
playbooks.hero: Best for audit preparation, deviation closure, and eQMS governance reviews.

playbooks.title: Builder runtime onboarding
checklist: Compile registry bundle and review field/table/workflow projections.
Check table semantics, labels, widgets, and form/runtime hints for builder consumption.
Verify digital-thread links and domain saved views for builder packs.
Capture module onboarding notes and selective publish scope before promotion.
playbooks.hero: Best for turning schema semantics into runtime metadata and builder accelerators.

releaseLanes.label: Standard lane
releaseLanes.hero: Fastest governed release lane when compatibility and stewardship are already strong.

releaseLanes.label: Review board
releaseLanes.hero: Default lane for world-class hardening, requiring structured review evidence.

releaseLanes.label: Elevated governance
releaseLanes.hero: Use when governance, workflow or evidence posture still needs formal remediation.
gates: Workflow bindings or runtime contracts clarified

releaseLanes.label: CAB / e-sign
releaseLanes.hero: Mandatory for destructive changes, policy tightening, or high-risk canonical releases.

aiCopilot.title: Impact-aware release notes
aiCopilot.objective: Generate release notes grouped by domain, approval class, and runtime impact.
aiCopilot.prompt: Summarize the typed diff for Blank Workspace Design Draft into release notes grouped by domain, breaking vs non-breaking, migration risk, runtime impact, and required approvals. Highlight destructive changes, blockers, and rollback evidence requirements.

aiCopilot.title: Hotspot refactor plan
aiCopilot.objective: Reduce dependency stress, missing metadata, and governance gaps on hub tables.
aiCopilot.prompt: Propose a remediation plan for hotspot table hotspot_table covering metadata enrichment, workflow bindings, policy posture, relation hygiene, index hints, and saved view presets for large-canvas readability.

aiCopilot.title: Manufacturing storyboard builder
aiCopilot.objective: Create line-ready views for planners, supervisors, and traceability teams.
aiCopilot.prompt: Generate a manufacturing storyboard for journey Production dispatch → execution with focused tables, risk/workflow/canonical overlays, saved view names, and review checkpoints for planners, supervisors, and quality leads.

aiCopilot.title: Quality & policy gap closure
aiCopilot.objective: Deepen stewardship, evidence, and RLS/policy semantics for controlled tables.
aiCopilot.prompt: Inspect the current quality/compliance schema and propose missing ownership, approver roles, evidence fields, policy metadata, and workflow bindings for inspection, deviation, CAPA, document, and training tables. Include approval implications and audit narrative.

aiCopilot.title: Registry sync blueprint
aiCopilot.objective: Turn schema metadata into form/API/workflow runtime contracts with selective publish guidance.
aiCopilot.prompt: Prepare a selective-publish plan that converts this schema into registry projections, field contracts, workflow bindings, builder pack hints, digital-thread links, and documentation artifacts. Include conflict resolution rules and compile order.

aiCopilot.title: Migration firewall review prompt
aiCopilot.objective: Explain why risky changes need staged rollout, backfill, or CAB escalation.
aiCopilot.prompt: Explain the migration risk posture for this schema compare with compatibility 100%, including destructive changes, lock risk, data backfill needs, rollback complexity, and recommended rollout sequence for standard/review/elevated/CAB lanes.

suggestedLayouts.label: Workflow-centric lens
suggestedLayouts.reason: Best for runtime contracts, approvals, and event chains.

notes: Prefer saved storyboard views over raw free-pan exploration for governance reviews.
Use compact density for line/execution walkthroughs and comfortable density for compliance audits.
Keep hotspot hub tables visible with KPI chips, but collapse low-signal domains during reviews.

Use promotion board stages as the default review route for release governance.
Track firewall score alongside compatibility; both must remain visible during sign-off.
